title: Introducing Strings
description: Learn what strings are and how to create them in Python
solution:
# A string is text surrounded by quotes
name = 'Alice'
message = 'Hello, world!'
number_as_text = '123'

print(name)
print(message)
print(number_as_text)

title: Adding Strings
description: Learn how to combine strings together using the + operator
solution:
# You can add strings together with +
first_name = 'Alice'
last_name = 'Smith'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name

greeting = 'Hello, ' + first_name + '!'

print(full_name)
print(greeting)

title: Introducing Variables
description: Learn how to store information in variables
solution:
# Variables store information
age = 25
height = 5.8
name = 'Bob'
is_student = True

print(age)
print(height)
print(name)
print(is_student)

title: Using Variables and print()
description: Learn how to display variable values with descriptive text
solution:
# Variables make your output more meaningful
score = 95
subject = 'Math'

print('Subject:', subject)
print('Score:', score)
print('Great job!')

title: Writing Programs
description: Learn how to write simple programs that use multiple variables
solution:
# A simple program about a pet
pet_name = 'Fluffy'
pet_type = 'cat'
pet_age = 3

print('Meet my pet!')
print('Name:', pet_name)
print('Type:', pet_type)
print('Age:', pet_age, 'years old')

title: Storing Calculations In Variables
description: Learn how to store the results of calculations in variables
solution:
# Store calculations in variables
length = 10
width = 5
area = length * width

price = 15.99
quantity = 3
total = price * quantity

print('Rectangle area:', area)
print('Total cost:', total)
